title: Voodoo Curses
description: A mod that adds voodoo dolls allowing players to curse or bless other players
body:
Voodoo Curses allow the player to use voodoo magic through custom items and mechanics. ## Voodoo Dolls By right clicking on a player with it you can bind the item to the target's soul. You can use pins with the doll. ## Pins They exists in 2 type the **Blessing Pin** and the **Cursing Pin**. By using them while holding a compatible item (listed below) they will absorb the curse or blessing associated to this item ### Compatible Items : #### Blessing - **Clover** (Luck) - **Cake** (Speed) - **Netherite Pickaxe** (Haste) - **Compacted Block of Netherite** (Full beacon effects) #### Curse - **Powder Snow Bucket** (Slowness) - **Grindstone** (Target take damage if wearing enchants) - **Blast Furnace** (Target take damage if wearing armor) - **Compacted Block of Netherite** (Target take damage until on 1/2 heart) ## Clover A rare item dropped by grass
## Profaned Block of Redstone A profaned version of the redstone block crafted in a smithing table with a **Redstone Block**, a **Soul Sand** like block and a **Voodoo Ritual Cursing Template** ## Purified Block of Lapis This lapis block has been purified through fire
